info.title: DiizerU
info.author: Cycl0o0
info.description: A Deezer Premium client for Wii U.
info.details: DiizerU is a homebrew Deezer client for the Nintendo Wii U. It pairs with your own Deezer account through a self-hostable Rust relay that decodes and streams audio straight to the console — album art, search, playlists and all.
